== Notes for [[Item:Q105653|Q105653]] ==

Possibly the same as his half-brother [http://www.geni.com/people/Awn-bin-Ja-afar-ut-Tayyar/6000000014644065025/ '''Awn bin Ja'afar ut-Tayyar''']

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source:

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000041313730452

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
